official_sources.authority_note: Official binary source for constructing the Play clientbound custom_chat_completions packet fixture.
Official binary source for the action enum and UTF-8 string-list body codec.
Official binary source for the Play clientbound packet table and custom_chat_completions packet id.
Official binary source for Play clientbound custom_chat_completions framed packet encode and dispatch/decode.

field_notes.action: Named official enum constant used directly through ClientboundCustomChatCompletionsPacket.Action.valueOf.
field_notes.entry: One short UTF-8 completion entry; no chat UI, command context, or game state is initialized.

stop_boundary: Proves Play clientbound custom_chat_completions packet framing and dispatch/decode for one ADD action and one string entry fixture only; do not infer chat UI behavior, command context behavior, completion lifecycle semantics, runtime Play entry, world load, spawn readiness, render readiness, or client-load completion.
